title: Pre-Qualify in 15 Minutes — No Documents, No Credit Pull
metaTitle: Pre-Qualify for a Mortgage in 15 Minutes — Vancouver
metaDescription: Soft mortgage pre-qualification in 15 minutes. No documents, no credit pull, no commitment. Find your realistic Greater Vancouver buying range before you apply.
intro: Just want a quick sense of what's possible? A 15-minute conversation gives you a realistic price range — without any documents, credit pull, or pressure to apply.

body.heading: When pre-qualification is the right step
paragraphs: If you're 6–18 months away from buying, the priority isn't a rate hold — it's understanding what you'd qualify for if you bought today, and what would change that number. A pre-qualification answers both, fast.

I ask you about your income, debts, down-payment savings, and credit picture. I run the federal stress test and give you a stress-tested maximum mortgage and home price. We talk through anything in your file that could push that number up — paying off a car loan, growing your down payment, fixing a credit reporting error.

body.heading: What you walk away with
paragraphs: After 15–20 minutes you'll have a range, not a precise number — and that's the point. The range gives you something realistic to plan around without burning a hard credit pull or committing to a lender.
bullets: Realistic maximum home price for your situation today
What three improvements would push that number meaningfully higher
Plain-English summary of the federal stress test as it applies to you
A list of what you'd need to actually move to pre-approval

whoItsFor: Want a realistic number before talking to realtors
Want to plan improvements (debt paydown, credit, savings) before applying
requirements: Just your time — 15–20 minutes by phone or video

faqs.question: Is a pre-qualification binding?
faqs.answer: No. It's a soft estimate, not a lender commitment. When you're ready to make offers, we'll convert it to a full pre-approval with documents and a rate hold.

faqs.question: Will it pull my credit?
faqs.answer: No — pre-qualification is conversation-only. No credit pull, no inquiry on your bureau.

faqs.question: How accurate is it?
faqs.answer: Within 5–10% of what you'd actually qualify for once we underwrite, assuming what you tell me about income and debts matches your documents.

keywords: how much mortgage can I afford Vancouver
